_: Build-time SEO + brand metadata. Baked into index.html by build/build.py at build time so search engines and social-card scrapers see the data WITHOUT running JavaScript. Edit this file to re-skin the brand's search/social presence — content.json is for visible page copy, this is for invisible-to-readers metadata.

meta.title: Singapore Sovereign CPaaS & AI Orchestration Platform | DOLPHLINK
meta.description: Singapore's sovereign communications spine. CPaaS, AI orchestration, and human-in-the-loop AI governance for governments, FinTech, healthcare, and regulated enterprises. 1,000+ Tier-1 operators across 200+ countries at 99.999% uptime. ISO 27001 certified, MAS TRM and IM8-aligned. Operated under Singapore's Cybersecurity Act.

smePage.title: DOLPHLINK × Lark for SME · SMS, WhatsApp, Voice for the SMEs the mainstream forgot
smePage.description: Carrier-grade communications wired straight into Lark. SMS / WhatsApp / Voice / Email for 5–500 person Asian SMEs. Pay per message, no enterprise contract, native Lark integration. Live in 10 minutes from SGD $99/month.

@graph.name: DOLPHLINK
@graph.description: Singapore-based sovereign CPaaS and AI governance platform serving governments, FinTech, healthcare, and regulated enterprises across 200+ countries.

@graph.name: Sovereign CPaaS Platform
@graph.description: Carrier-grade SMS, voice, phone-numbers, and AI-Human orchestration delivered through one programmable API. 99.999% uptime, MAS TRM and IM8-aligned, 1,000+ tier-1 operators, 200+ countries.

@graph.name: Global SMS API
@graph.description: Direct connections to 1,000+ tier-1 mobile operators with sub-10-second delivery and 98% verified open rate. Three audiences served: developers (REST API + SDKs), marketers (Pages + Campaigns), customer service (unified inbox).

@graph.name: Enterprise Voice & SIP
@graph.description: Geo-redundant SIP trunking with TTS, DTMF input, call forwarding, and per-call fraud-monitoring telemetry. Built for contact centres, SMBs, and IP PBX resellers.

@graph.name: Global Phone Numbers
@graph.description: Local, national, mobile, toll-free numbers in 100+ countries plus Sender IDs, Short Codes, and Hosted Numbers (SMS/Voice on existing landlines). Built-in compliance intelligence per region.

@graph.name: Dolphlink Touch — Multi-Channel Hub
@graph.description: Unified messaging API across SMS, WhatsApp, RCS, Email, with intelligent automatic fallback when delivery fails on the primary channel.

@graph.name: Dolphlink Smart — AI Chatbot Builder
@graph.description: No-code drag-and-drop AI bot and voicebot builder with role-based access control and ISO 27001 / GDPR compliance. Context-aware AI integrated with your existing data sources.

@graph.name: Dolphlink One-API
@graph.description: Single programmable API across SMS, voice, WhatsApp, Email, and emerging channels with automatic channel fallback. SDKs in Node, Python, Go, Java, PHP.

@graph.name: Dolphlink Nexus — AI Agent Orchestration
@graph.description: Sovereign AI command centre unifying bots, RPA, custom models, and human reviewers behind a single auditable control plane. Tamper-evident logs and full data residency.

@graph.name: Operations Hub
@graph.description: Messaging Gateway + Message Log + Messaging Analytics. Real-time monitoring of every message, status, content, and cost across all channels.

@graph.name: AI-Digital Solutions — Custom Integration
@graph.description: Bespoke AI-Digital migration services that integrate legacy systems with DOLPHLINK's communications, AI orchestration, and compliance layers on the customer's data residency requirements.

@graph.name: DOLPHLINK
@graph.description: Singapore-based sovereign CPaaS and AI orchestration platform. 1,000+ Tier-1 operator routes across 200+ countries at 99.999% uptime. SMS, voice, and human-in-the-loop AI governance for governments, FinTech, and regulated enterprises. Operated under Singapore's Cybersecurity Act, MAS TRM and IM8-aligned.

@graph.name: DOLPHLINK SMS Platform
@graph.description: Direct connections to 1,000+ tier-1 mobile operators for global SMS in under 10 seconds. Developer-first API with comprehensive documentation, Pages mobile landing pages, Campaigns for personalized bulk messaging, two-way messaging via Short Codes and Long Numbers, TLS 1.3 encryption with priority OTP routing, and 24/7 NOC with automatic carrier failover.

@graph.name: DOLPHLINK Voice & SIP
@graph.description: Geo-redundant SIP trunking with text-to-speech, audio notifications, call forwarding, DTMF input, fraud monitoring, WebRTC bridge for browser agents, full G.711/G.729/Opus codec support, tamper-proof call recording, real-time jitter and packet-loss metrics, and one-click DID porting.

@graph.name: DOLPHLINK Phone Numbers
@graph.description: Local, national, mobile, and toll-free numbers across 100+ countries. Alphanumeric Sender IDs, Short Codes, Hosted Numbers, built-in Compliance Intelligence, number porting in under 48 hours, vanity reservation, and centralized inventory dashboard.

@graph.name: Dolphlink Touch
@graph.description: Unified business messaging hub across SMS, WhatsApp, RCS, Email, and emerging channels. Marketing-friendly templates, drag-and-drop campaign builder, intelligent automatic fallback, native WhatsApp Business Platform integration with template approval, dynamic segment targeting, and end-to-end conversion analytics.

@graph.name: Dolphlink API
@graph.description: One programmable API across SMS, voice, WhatsApp, Email, and emerging channels. Drop-in SDK with intelligent automatic fallback. Five language SDKs (Node, Python, Go, Java, PHP), interactive sandbox with live test numbers, signed webhook delivery with automatic retry, and comprehensive request replay logs.

@graph.name: Dolphlink Smart
@graph.description: No-code conversation builder for AI-Human workflows. Bots and human agents in seamless handoff, context-aware understanding, ISO 27001 / GDPR / RBAC built in, knowledge base ingestion from PDF/web/database, fine-tuning for domain terminology, multilingual conversation across 40+ languages, and sentiment-driven escalation.

@graph.name: Dolphlink Nexus
@graph.description: Sovereign command center for AI-Human orchestration. Unifies bots, RPA flows, custom models, and human reviewers into one auditable control plane. Built-in migration support, full data residency, RBAC, activity logs, visual workflow designer with conditional logic and approval gates, tamper-evident audit trails for regulator review.

@graph.name: DOLPHLINK Operations Hub
@graph.description: Centralized API key management, full message log with status, content, and real-time costs. Aggregated insights, real-time trends, threshold-based alerts, monthly cost forecasting by channel and region, plus CSV and Webhook exports to BI, finance, and compliance pipelines.

@graph.name: DOLPHLINK AI-Digital Solutions
@graph.description: Tailored AI-Digital migration for existing infrastructure projects. Bespoke integrations between legacy systems and DOLPHLINK communications, AI orchestration, and compliance layers. Phased rollout with four-week discovery workshop, parallel-run pilots, gradual cutover, dedicated solution architect, 24/7 priority support, and custom SLA terms.

@graph.name: DOLPHLINK Portfolio
@graph.description: Full DOLPHLINK CPaaS, AI governance, and digital solution portfolio.
